description: HeartMath primary-source claims (kickoff). Grounds the existing OB research agenda dated 2026-03-25 on HRV coherence / cardiac coherence / Schumann / global coherence (McCraty, Radin, Oschman). PDFs on disk under Documents/heartmath_corpus/; retrieval notes in docs/theory/heartmath_phase4_8_excerpts.md. Kickoff commit contains SourceWork nodes only (no claims) — excerpt extraction + domain-taxonomy extension follow in Phase 4.8 body.

works.title: Tomasino (1997) — New technology provides scientific evidence of water's capacity to store and amplify weak electromagnetic and subtle energy fields
works.body: Dana Tomasino, *Institute for HeartMath Publication No. 97*, 1997. Early HeartMath institutional report on water-structure experiments: water as liquid-crystal lattice with infinite capacity to store electromagnetic and subtle energy fields. Source URL: othernetworks.org/images/5/53/Water-Research-Report_Dana_Tomasino.pdf. PDF: 190KB, 4pp.

works.title: Danielson, Jeffers, Kaiser et al. (2014) — Sustained Hospital-based Wellness Program [HeartMath]
works.body: Kimberly Danielson, Kay Jeffers, Linda Kaiser et al., *Global Advances in Health and Medicine* 3(Suppl 1), 2014. PMC3923282. HeartMath mastery deployed across >1000 hospital-system employees as a sustained population-health intervention. PDF: 425KB via PMC gahmj.2014.BPA05.pdf.

works.title: Oschman & Oschman (2015) — The Heart as a Bi-Directional Scalar Field Antenna
works.body: James L. Oschman & Nora H. Oschman, *Journal of Vortex Science and Technology* 2(2), 2015. Cites HeartMath Institute confirmation of Rein's resonance hypothesis; proposes the heart as a scalar field antenna (Whittaker-style longitudinal decomposition) coupling to external subtle-energy fields. PDF: 510KB retrieved via web.archive.org snapshot of sparkleoflife.com.au (original host suspended).

works.title: Edwards (2018) — Call for papers: Special section on HeartMath for Psychology
works.body: S. Edwards, *Journal of Psychology in Africa* 28(5), 2018. Taylor & Francis. DOI 10.1080/14330237.2018.1528007. Editorial call for papers soliciting evaluation of psychological behaviour using HeartMath approaches, methods and techniques; references the HeartMath research library at heartmath.org/research/research-library. PDF: 499KB via tandfonline.com (browser-context fetch; curl blocked by Cloudflare).
